subject: Thank you for applying to Stripe
body: Hi Silas, thank you for applying to the Software Engineer role at Stripe. We will review your application and follow up.

subject: We received your application for Backend Engineer
body: Hello, we received your application for the Backend Engineer position. Our team will get back to you soon.

subject: Update on your Stripe application
body: Hi Silas, unfortunately we have decided to move forward with other candidates for the Software Engineer role.

subject: Next steps for your Backend Engineer application
body: We would like to schedule a phone screen to discuss the Backend Engineer role. Please share availability.

subject: Your offer from Acme
body: Congratulations Silas, we are pleased to extend a formal offer letter for the Backend Engineer position.

subject: Weekly newsletter
body: This week's top stories cover product launches and industry trends. Thanks for subscribing!

subject: Thank you for applying to our beta program
body: Thanks for joining our beta program for our new product launch. No prior experience required!
